bird.name: Purple-backed fairywren
bird.summary: The purple-backed fairywren (Malurus assimilis) is a fairywren that is native to Australia. Described by Alfred John North in 1901, it has…

locations.name: Alfred John North
locations.summary: Alfred John North (11 June 1855 – 6 May 1917) was an Australian ornithologist.

relations.subject: Purple-backed fairywren
relations.evidence: The purple-backed fairywren (Malurus assimilis) is a fairywren that is native to Australia

relations.subject: Purple-backed fairywren
relations.evidence: Distributed over much of the Australian continent, the purple-backed fairywren is found in scrubland with plenty of vegetation providing dense cover
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Purple-backed fairywren
relations.evidence: There is little information on the other subspecies. It is found in scrubland with plenty of vegetation providing dense cover
